channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Astronomers shocked by how these giant exoplanets formed
item.description: A distant star system with four super-sized gas giants has revealed a surprise. Thanks to JWST’s powerful vision, astronomers detected sulfur in their...

item.title: Interstellar comet 3I/ATLAS is spraying water across the solar system
item.description: For millions of years, a frozen wanderer drifted between the stars before slipping into our solar system as 3I/ATLAS—only the third known interstellar...

item.title: Blockbuster weight loss drugs like Ozempic deliver big results but face big questions
item.description: Three major reviews commissioned by the World Health Organization find that GLP-1 drugs including tirzepatide (sold as Mounjaro and Zepbound), semaglu...

item.title: Almost every forest bird in Hawaiʻi is spreading avian malaria
item.description: Avian malaria is spreading across Hawaiʻi in a way scientists didn’t fully grasp until now: nearly every forest bird species can help keep the disease...

item.title: Life may have started as sticky goo clinging to rocks
item.description: Life may have started in sticky, rock-hugging gels rather than inside cells. Researchers suggest these primitive, biofilm-like materials could trap an...

item.title: NSF and partners invest $9M in AI-focused math education program
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation Directorate for Social, Behavioral, and Economic Sciences (NSF SBE) has launched the Collaboratory to Advance Mat...

item.title: Intent to restructure critical weather science infrastructure
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation (NSF) announced today that the agency is reviewing the structure of the research and observational capabilities o...

item.title: NSF announces new initiative to launch and scale a new generation of transformative independent research organizations to advance breakthrough science
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation Directorate for Technology, Innovation and Partnerships (NSF TIP) on Friday announced the launch of a new initiat...

item.title: NSF invests $30M in EPSCoR jurisdictions for research and workforce development in energy, semiconductors, nanotechnology and biotechnology
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation is investing approximately $30 million in institutions across Montana, Idaho and Louisiana to establish NSF EPSCo...

item.title: NSF and UKRI launch $10M quantum chemistry collaborative research effort
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation and United Kingdom Research and Innovation (UKRI) are investing in eight joint research projects that could open ...
